animeStory2Codes.title: Anime Story 2 Codes
animeStory2Codes.intro: Use the latest Anime Story 2 codes for Gems, Trait Tokens, Secret Orbs, and extra progression resources before starting long farming sessions.

cards.reward: 15 Red Stars, 50 Trait Tokens, 10,000 Gems, 500 Slime Tokens, and 15 Secret Orbs

animeStory2Codes.redeemTitle: How to redeem Anime Story 2 codes
redeemSteps: Launch Anime Story 2 on Roblox and complete the tutorial.
Press the Codes button on the right side of the screen.
Paste one code exactly and click Claim.
Rejoin after updates if a code does not apply immediately.

animeStory2BeginnerGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Beginner Guide
animeStory2BeginnerGuide.intro: This Anime Story 2 route keeps early progression simple: get free resources first, build one core team, then delay expensive rerolls until your roster stabilizes.

steps.title: Finish tutorial and unlock menus
steps.description: Clear the intro flow before spending Gems or reroll tokens.

steps.title: Redeem all active codes first
steps.description: Grab early Gems and Trait Tokens before summoning.

steps.title: Build one main squad
steps.description: Equip your strongest five units and focus on synergy.

steps.title: Upgrade one carry first
steps.description: Concentrate upgrade resources instead of spreading them thin.

steps.title: Farm quests and stage clears daily
steps.description: Use dailies and story progression to refill Gems and upgrade materials.

animeStory2TierList.title: Anime Story 2 Tier List
animeStory2TierList.intro: Use this Anime Story 2 tier snapshot to prioritize investment and banner decisions across story, raids, and long-form grind content.

animeStory2UnitsGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Units Guide
animeStory2UnitsGuide.intro: Anime Story 2 unit value depends on role coverage, scaling speed, and upgrade cost, not just rarity labels.

cards.name: Carry DPS Units
cards.description: Use one high-damage carry to secure stage wins and boss clears.

cards.name: Support and Utility Units
cards.description: Prioritize allies that add first-strike, healing, crit boost, or enemy marks.

cards.name: Tank Units
cards.description: One stable frontline slot prevents resets in tower and raid runs.

cards.name: Bridge Legendary Units
cards.description: Strong Legendary picks can carry while waiting for Mythic and Secret upgrades.

animeStory2TraitsRerollsGuide.title: Anime Story 2 Traits and Rerolls Guide
animeStory2TraitsRerollsGuide.intro: Traits are passive buffs for units, and each unit can hold one trait at a time. Use Trait Tokens at the lobby Upgrade NPC to reroll for stronger damage, survival, or utility bonuses.

traits.name: Monarch
traits.description: Top-end roll with major crit, health, and damage boosts. Keep on every long-term carry.

traits.name: Ethereal and Berserk
traits.description: High-value damage traits for pure DPS carries that need faster stage and boss clears.

traits.name: Solar and Cosmic
traits.description: Balanced traits that add both survivability and damage for bruiser or hybrid units.

traits.name: Dead Eye and Sharp Shooter
traits.description: Critical-focused traits for units that scale with crit chance and crit damage.

traits.name: Impair III and Keen III
traits.description: Strong mid-tier keeps while farming for rare traits with limited Trait Tokens.

traits.name: Vigor and Tank
traits.description: Useful survival options for frontline units, but reroll on main carries when possible.

animeStory2WorldsProgression.title: Anime Story 2 Worlds and Story Progression
animeStory2WorldsProgression.intro: There are 11 story worlds and each one has 7 stages. Push the newest world you can clear, then return to Stage VII farms for shards, relic crafting, and evolution materials.

steps.title: Green Planet
steps.description: Combat Power 55 to 1.33K. Farm Stage VII for Green Shards and early evolution materials like Scantron.

steps.title: Desert
steps.description: Combat Power 2.05K to 6.07K. Stage VII drops Orange Shards for Kunai relic crafting.

steps.title: Double Dungeon
steps.description: Combat Power 6.8K to 13.3K. Stage VII drops Blue Shards for Elixir relic crafting.

steps.title: Titan City
steps.description: Combat Power 14K to 18.8K. Stage VII drops Grey Shards for Grapple Hook relic crafting.

steps.title: Beach Harbor
steps.description: Combat Power 19K to 33.2K. Stage VII drops Yellow Shards for Strawhat relic crafting.

steps.title: Gold District
steps.description: Combat Power 34K to 44.1K. Stage VII drops Red Shards for Katana relic crafting.

steps.title: Soul Haven
steps.description: Combat Power 35.4K to 50.9K. Treat as progression priority before heavy farming.

steps.title: Realm Seven
steps.description: Combat Power 59K to 64.8K. Farm for unit drops and related evolution materials.

steps.title: Snow Village
steps.description: Combat Power 60.8K to 99.3K. Stage VII drops Purple Shards for Flame Sword crafting.

steps.title: Heroic City
steps.description: Combat Power 78.6K to 171K. Stage VII drops Brown Shards for Baseball Bat crafting.

steps.title: Rome
steps.description: Combat Power 63K to 170K. Stage VII can drop Unbreaking Diamond for Golden Wind evolution.

animeStory2ItemsRelicsMaterials.title: Anime Story 2 Items Relics and Evolution Materials
animeStory2ItemsRelicsMaterials.intro: Use this Anime Story 2 resource map to decide what to farm first for upgrades, rerolls, relic crafting, ascension, and evolution progress.

cards.name: Trait Tokens and Stat Chips
cards.description: Main reroll resources from Coin Shop, codes, quests, and challenges. Prioritize for long-term carries.

cards.name: Ascend Tickets
cards.description: Use mainly on high-value Legendary, Mythic, Secret, or Exclusive units.

cards.name: Stage VII Shards
cards.description: Green, Orange, Blue, Grey, Yellow, Red, Purple, and Brown Shards power relic crafting across progression tiers.

cards.name: Raid Shop Evolution Materials
cards.description: Target specific raids for Sangetsu Blade, Shirayuki Core, Raven Feather, Ki Orb, Earring, Rose, and similar evolution items.

cards.name: Star Evolution Items
cards.description: Green, Yellow, Purple, Red, and Rainbow Stars are core evolution bottlenecks from challenges and shops.

cards.name: Consumables
cards.description: Use Drops, Luck, and Coins potions right before farming sessions to increase output efficiency.

cards.name: Early and Mid-Game Relics
cards.description: Dragon Ball, Kunai, Elixir, Grapple Hook, Strawhat, and Katana provide clean stat spikes while climbing story worlds.

cards.name: Late-Game and Hybrid Relics
cards.description: Flame Sword, Baseball Bat, Demon Ring, Coal, and Candy support endgame crit, damage, health, and defensive builds.

animeStory2TowerRaidsSlimeEvent.title: Anime Story 2 Tower Raids and Slime Event
animeStory2TowerRaidsSlimeEvent.intro: After story progression, Tower, Raids, and the Slime event are the main routes for rerolls, raid tokens, evolution materials, and event currency.

cards.name: Tower of Ascension
cards.description: Push loop milestones for rerolls and limited-unit chances. Difficulty spikes near each 250-floor cycle endpoint.

cards.name: Raids and Raid Shop
cards.description: Farm the raid tied to your target evolution and spend tokens on focused materials instead of split projects.

cards.name: Slime Apocalypse Event
cards.description: Farm Slime Tokens for event shop value, then choose between upgrade items and exclusive banner progress.

cards.name: Recommended Farming Order
cards.description: Push story, farm needed Stage VII shards, clear Tower milestones, run target raids, then optimize event token spending.

faq.title: Anime Story 2
faq.subtitle: Quick answers for Anime Story 2 progression, codes, and event loops

questions.question: How often do Anime Story 2 codes update?
questions.answer: Anime Story 2 codes usually appear around updates, milestones, and re-release announcements.

questions.question: What should I do first in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Complete the tutorial, redeem codes, build a five-unit core team, then push story worlds and dailies.

questions.question: Which mode gives the best Anime Story 2 late-game rewards?
questions.answer: Tower, raids, and event cycles provide the strongest long-term reward loops when your core roster is stable.

questions.question: When should I reroll traits in Anime Story 2?
questions.answer: Reroll after you confirm a unit is part of your long-term team, so Trait Tokens are not wasted.

cta.title: Ready to Master Anime Story 2?
cta.description: Jump into Anime Story 2 on Roblox and join the community for codes, updates, and team strategies.
